prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: DOY-BASIC-GEOKIT-BUN Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 40pc Beginner Geology Rockhounding Equipment Kit for Gems, Geodes and Fossil Hunting Description: If rockhounding, gem mining or fossils are a hobby or interest, you’ll need the right tools to set yourself up for success in the field. From breaking up deposits to cleaning and examining materials, this 40pc ASR Outdoor rockhounding tools kit has you covered.

A must have, this 20oz hammer features a rubberized grip for shock reduction; 11 inches in length and forged from one piece of steel, one side features a square face for hammering rock or driving chisels, while the opposing pointed tip allows you to crack open rocks or hard, dense material. In addition, we've included a three piece hardened steel cold chisel set for breaking open rocks or other dense material. The chisel set is made from chrome molybdenum steel with a hardness rating of HRC 55-58; the chisel set features incredible tensile strength, impact resistance and toughness, standing up to intense wear and tear in the field. They measure set measures 9.5, 10 and 12 inches and include two flat heads chisels and one cross cut head chisel.

Once you’ve made a mess in the field, you’re going to need to sort, examine and tidy up any newfound materials; this kit includes a mini steel wire mesh classifier to screen off larger unwanted raw materials, examination brushes, plastic baggies and a magnification jewelers loupe and more.

The ASR Outdoor rockhounding bag features double stitching at all stress points to ensure that it will last through years of prospecting or camping trips. The tote bag made of high quality nylon that is naturally weather resistant, so you can count on it to protect your tools and gear rain or shine. The tote bag has 13 different pockets and features quick release buckles so you can access your tools quickly and easily. Whether you’re on the hunt for emeralds in North Carolina, jade in Big Sur, California, or fossils in Wyoming, this rockhounding kit from ASR Outdoor will have you organized and prepared for your next mineral mining adventure. Good luck! Search Terms: geology rock pick hammer rockhound kit mining prospecting safety goggles beginner intermediate gemstone mineral hunting science archaeology archaeologist miner gift carry bag case deluxe premium fossil hounding lapidary field tools Features: - 40PC BEGINNER ROCKHOUNDING KIT: Included in this 40pc geology kit are the right tools to set yourself up for success in the field; from breaking up deposits to cleaning and examining materials, fossil hunting, gem mining and rockhounding has never been so easy - COLD STEEL CHISEL SET: Made from chrome molybdenum steel with a hardness rating of HRC 55-58, this ASR Outdoor chisel set has incredible tensile strength, impact resistance and toughness, standing up to intense wear and tear in the field; Cold steel chisel set measures 9.5, 10 and 12 inches and include two flat heads chisels and one cross cut head chisel - ROCK PICK HAMMER: A must have in the field is this 20oz hammer with shock absorbing rubber grip; measuring 11 inches in length and forged from one solid piece of steel, one side of the hammer head features a square face for hammering rock or driving chisels, while the pointed tip allows you to crack open rocks or hard, dense material - TOOL BAG: The included nylon tool bag makes it easy to carry all your geology rock hounding equipment to and from site, keeping everything organized and in one place; the tool bag features easily accessible side pockets, a zipper closure and large middle compartment for all your equipment - ROCKHOUNDING EQUIPMENT: Once you've made a mess in the field, you're going to need to sort, examine and tidy up any new found materials; this kit includes an aluminum storage container, brushes, eye loupe, plastic storage baggies, tweezers and more === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 40pc Beginner Geology Rockhounding Equipment Kit
